scripts.build:desktop: pnpm --filter @officexr/web run build && pnpm --filter @officexr/desktop run build
scripts.dist:desktop:mac: pnpm --filter @officexr/web run build && pnpm --filter @officexr/desktop run dist:mac
scripts.dist:desktop:win: pnpm --filter @officexr/web run build && pnpm --filter @officexr/desktop run dist:win
scripts.dist:desktop:linux: pnpm --filter @officexr/web run build && pnpm --filter @officexr/desktop run dist:linux
scripts.dist:desktop:all: pnpm --filter @officexr/web run build && pnpm --filter @officexr/desktop run dist:all
